title: MobClash Rank Threshold DataTable Row
description: UE DataTable JSON row schema for rank progression thresholds.

DisplayName.description: Localized display token or fallback string.

TotalXPRequired.description: Cumulative XP required to reach this rank.

XPToNextRank.description: XP needed from this rank to the next rank (0 at cap).

SoftCurrencyReward.description: Optional one-time currency reward granted on rank-up.
